narrative:
Clermont County has 148,353 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 27.7% of registrants.
